title: 60-page contract. You changed one clause. One section re-summarized. The risk-rollup updated. Nothing else moved.

beats.name: cold-boot
beats.caption: the whole contract graph lights up once — 8 sections, rollup, exec, report

beats.name: quiet
beats.caption: a re-scan with no edits · every node memo-skips · cost flat near zero

beats.name: self-tick
beats.caption: self-tick audit floor · a lone self-pulse on the rollup, no edges, no cost

beats.name: hero-one-clause
beats.caption: HERO: edit ONE clause in §3 · only Summarize §3 wakes · 7 sibling sections stay DARK · rollup → exec → report update

beats.name: memo-hit
beats.caption: cosmetic edit to §3 (reflow only) · the gateway memo-SKIPS · no lane lit · no rollup · the edit was not material

beats.name: second-clause
beats.caption: a substantive edit to §5 · a DIFFERENT single lane lights · the dark lane is real, not luck

beats.name: final-quiet
beats.caption: it goes quiet again · cost back to flat
